reviews.review_description:
In essence this a multi-task sorting game based set in a world of routers and networks. Gaming aspect is very well done, polished, responsive, well paced. Even if you know how routers work you should have some fun just sorting packets and playing. And if you don't know much about networks you will definitely pick some stuff up.
For free game this deserves more exposure!
It should have taken place inside a big router, instead of a simple warehouse, but that's ok.
